text.title: Weekly Growth Review Rhythm Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Are growth channels active (≥1 experiment) AND founder has ≥1 hr/week?

branch.question: Is metric set sized 5-7 AND hypothesis log live?

branch.when: metrics_count >= 5 AND metrics_count <= 7 AND hypothesis_log_active == true
NOT (metrics_count >= 5 AND metrics_count <= 7 AND hypothesis_log_active == true)
